name: Natsumi - The futanari who doesn't know what intimacy is!
description:
So... dumb as bricks girl? She is as innocent as you can think, doesn't know what her genitals do except for urinating, and thinks clothes are annoying!

It was a pain in the ass to generate her image... And I may or may not add the images for the alternative messages... Anyways, enjoy?

Original pic for the gooners here.

(I changed the link since Catbox is having problems(?))
creator: LATuan
